prompts.name: Floral Pattern
prompts.text: Add tasteful floral patterns to clothing, wallpaper, fabric, or decoration with balanced scale and natural color harmony.

prompts.name: Geometric Pattern
prompts.text: Add clean geometric patterns with repeated shapes, sharp structure, and modern visual order.

prompts.name: Stripes
prompts.text: Add stripe patterns with clear spacing, fabric-aware wrapping, and balanced visual rhythm.

prompts.name: Plaid
prompts.text: Add plaid fabric patterns with intersecting lines, woven texture, and classic styling.

prompts.name: Polka Dots
prompts.text: Add polka dot patterns with consistent spacing, playful character, and clean surface placement.

prompts.name: Damask
prompts.text: Add damask-style decorative patterns with ornate symmetry, elegant curves, and refined historical texture.

prompts.name: Lace Overlay
prompts.text: Add lace overlay detail with delicate openwork, semi-transparent structure, and graceful edges.

prompts.name: Star Pattern
prompts.text: Add star patterns with magical or playful character, balanced spacing, and clean decorative placement.

prompts.name: Moon Motif
prompts.text: Add moon motifs through accessories, fabric decoration, background detail, or fantasy design elements.

prompts.name: Tribal Motif
prompts.text: Add stylized tribal-inspired motifs with respectful abstract geometry and strong graphic rhythm.

prompts.name: Wave Pattern
prompts.text: Add flowing wave patterns with smooth curves, natural rhythm, and ocean-inspired elegance.

prompts.name: Leaf Pattern
prompts.text: Add leaf patterns with botanical detail, organic shapes, and natural color harmony.

prompts.name: Checkerboard
prompts.text: Add checkerboard patterns with crisp contrast, clean repetition, and controlled visual impact.

prompts.name: Embroidery
prompts.text: Add embroidered patterns with raised thread texture, decorative detail, and realistic fabric integration.

prompts.name: Filigree
prompts.text: Add intricate filigree ornamentation with fine curling lines, metallic elegance, and refined craftsmanship.
